Module Videos

Use this page to organize lecture videos, demonstrations, and supporting media for this module.

Featured Lecture

Video Title: Introduction to Module 1

Add a brief summary of what students should focus on while watching this lecture.

Instructions: Add video via "Insert Stuff" to upload from the Media Library, Panopto Video Embed 1.3, My Computer, YouTube, or Enter Embed Code.

Additional Videos

Supplemental Video 1

Add a short note about why this video is helpful.

Supplemental Video 2

Add a short note about the topic covered in this video.

Watch Video

To add more supplemental videos, copy the HTML code below and paste it after the second-to-last </div> tag:

<div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:12px;padding:14px;background:#ffffff;"> <p style="margin:0 0 6px 0;"><strong>Supplemental Video 3</strong></p> <p style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#4c4a4f;"> Add a short note about the topic covered in this video. </p> <a href="PASTE-VIDEO-LINK-HERE" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:#cb4900;text-decoration:underline;"> Watch Video </a> </div>

Notes and Resources

  • Add lecture slides here
  • Add reading links here
  • Add practice resources here

Accessibility Reminder

Make sure videos include captions or transcripts whenever possible, and provide a direct link in case the embedded version does not load for some students.

  • KB Article: Accessibility in Brightspace.
